en: So terrible.
You gave me a cookie, I gave you a cookie.
ko: 네가 나한테 쿠키를 줬고, 나도 너한테 쿠키를 줬어.

en: You gave me a cookie, gave you a cookie.
ko: 네가 나한테 쿠키를 줬고, 나는 너한테 쿠키를 줬어.

en: Gave me a cookie, got you a cookie.
ko: 나한테 쿠키를 줬고, 너한테 쿠키를 줬어.

en: You gave me a cookie, I got you a cookie, man.
ko: 네가 나한테 쿠키를 줬고, 나는 너한테 쿠키를 줬어, 친구. 나한테 쿠키를 줬고, 너한테 쿠키를 줬어.

en: Gave me a cookie, got you a cookie. We're even.
We're even, Schmidt.
I mean, what do you want from me?
What do you want, Schmidt?
I've been wracking my brain all day.
I walked around the grocery store, man, for 45 minutes.
I didn't know what to get you.
Then I was thinking I was going to get you ramen, like what you used to eat.
ko: 그때 너가 예전처럼 먹던 라면을 사줄까 생각했어.

en: But you probably eat, like, fancy ramen now, with, like, figs in it.
ko: 하지만 이제 너는 무화과 같은 고급 라면을 먹을 것 같아.

en: I don't know, man.
You love me too much, Schmidt.
And you picked the wrong guy.
And when are you going to get that giant head of yours?
ko: 너의 그 거대한 머리를 언제 좀 가질 건데?

en: I'm just going to let you down, man.
Are you going to let me down?
